meaning: n.苦心经营,苦心经营的结果,详尽的细节
examples: The importance of the plan needs no further elaboration.
After the homework has been discussed, the teacher explains the topic of the lesson, slowly and with a lot of repetition and elaboration.
The development of an understanding of the self becomes evident between the first and second years of life and shows rapid elaboration in subsequent years.
And this is no doubt a good thing, for reasons that hardly need elaboration.
The Diagnostic is the first milestone in the elaboration of a global Framework of Action.
